brief: Global tensions rise with Australia and China discussing submarine missile launches, Trump threatening Houthi blockades, and Hegseth requesting $88bn for the Iran war. Meanwhile, new AI models and research on human-computer interaction highlight ongoing tech advances.
news_summary: Key geopolitical moves: Australia pushes China on submarine launches; Trump vows action against Houthis; Hegseth defends Iran war funding. Domestically, NYC braces for floods, and the Gates Foundation reveals extensive Epstein meetings.
papers_summary: Research explores AI-assisted information evaluation, multitasking with computer agents, and generative widgets for analysis. Other papers address player reflection in games, LLM code explanations, and Mars rover drive retrieval.

en.brief: Global tensions rise with Australia and China discussing submarine missile launches, Trump threatening Houthi blockades, and Hegseth requesting $88bn for the Iran war. Meanwhile, new AI models and research on human-computer interaction highlight ongoing tech advances.
en.news_summary: Key geopolitical moves: Australia pushes China on submarine launches; Trump vows action against Houthis; Hegseth defends Iran war funding. Domestically, NYC braces for floods, and the Gates Foundation reveals extensive Epstein meetings.
en.papers_summary: Research explores AI-assisted information evaluation, multitasking with computer agents, and generative widgets for analysis. Other papers address player reflection in games, LLM code explanations, and Mars rover drive retrieval.

zh.brief: 今日重點：英國新首相就任、廈門翔安機場引發台灣安全疑慮、智能戒指提前偵測懷孕；研究關注AI輔助資訊評估與使用者反饋。
zh.news_summary: 貝安德接任英國首相，深圳地鐵因APEC加強安檢惹議，廈門翔安機場距金門僅三公里引發軍事關切，台灣演習首度模擬斷網。
zh.papers_summary: 多項研究探討AI在資訊評估中的修辭策略、多任務電腦代理溝通設計，以及LLM程式碼解釋對不同學習者的適應性。

todays_image.caption: Both involve submarines traversing oceans, but one delivered mail while the other delivers diplomatic tension over missile launches.
todays_image.title: First ocean to ocean submarine mail service cover
